data.content: Plan complete. 6 work packages created as child knots of 87bd, linked with blocked_by dependency chain. Execution order: WP1 (8817) domain types → WP2 (a6a8) immutability enforcement → WP3 (2d33) creation paths → WP4 (ecae) rehydration/compat → WP5 (0840) visibility filtering → WP6 (9767) integration tests. Key design: LeaseReference typed struct replaces Option<String> lease_id; ImmutableRecord trait enforces shared contract; step history goes fully append-only via supersedes_id pattern. Riskiest change is WP2 (step history refactor). All new fields use serde(default) for backward compatibility.
